description: Use this API to add or modify all OPF generator reserve records in a specified subsystem of the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_genrsv_subsys(sid, all, realar, useval)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem id from 0 to 11. a subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: useval
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying (default treatment same as value of 0). (input).

realar.description: unit ramp rate in MW/minute (default value of 9999.0 for new records, current value used otherwise).
unit capability in MW (default value of 9999.0 for new records, current value used otherwise).

useval.description: indicates how the value of REALAR(1) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be multiplied by the present value of the unit ramp rate.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be added to the present value of the unit ramp rate.
indicates how the value of REALAR(2) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be multiplied by the present value of the unit capability.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be added to the present value of the unit capability.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
generator reserve unit table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
